response: Chancellor Otto von Bismarck and the Reichstag Agreement were also part of the **League of the Three Emperors** (Dreikaiserabkommen), which was an alliance between the German Empire, the Russian Empire, and Austria-Hungary. This league was established in 1873 and lasted until 1887. Bismarck played a central role in its formation and was its head of foreign policy. The Reichstag Agreement, signed in 1876, was part of this alliance and aimed to address the Eastern question in the Balkans.
